# vis_omop_table { #cdmconnector.vis_omop_table }

```python
vis_omop_table(
    result,
    estimate_name=None,
    header=None,
    settings_column=None,
    group_column=None,
    rename=None,
    type=None,
    hide=None,
    column_order=None,
    factor=None,
    style=None,
    show_min_cell_count=True,
    options=None,
)
```

Format a summarised_result DataFrame into a display table (visOmopTable port).

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name                | Type                                | Description                                                                                                                                                          | Default    |
|---------------------|-------------------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|------------|
| result              | DataFrame                           | Summarised result with standard columns (result_id, cdm_name, group_*, strata_*, variable_name, variable_level, estimate_name, estimate_type, estimate_value, etc.). | _required_ |
| estimate_name       | dict                                | E.g. {"N (%)": "<count> (<percentage>)", "N": "<count>"}.                                                                                                            | `None`     |
| header              | list of str                         | Columns to use as table header.                                                                                                                                      | `None`     |
| settings_column     | list                                | Settings columns to include (if result has settings merged).                                                                                                         | `None`     |
| group_column        | list                                | E.g. [strata_columns(result)].                                                                                                                                       | `None`     |
| rename              | dict                                | Display names for columns.                                                                                                                                           | `None`     |
| type                | \'dataframe\' \| \'html\' \| \'gt\' |                                                                                                                                                                      | `None`     |
| hide                | list of str                         | Columns to drop (default includes result_id, estimate_type).                                                                                                         | `None`     |
| column_order        | list of str                         | Final column order.                                                                                                                                                  | `None`     |
| factor              | dict                                | Column -> ordered list of levels (for categorical order).                                                                                                            | `None`     |
| style               | str                                 |                                                                                                                                                                      | `None`     |
| show_min_cell_count | bool                                | If True and settings has min_cell_count, show suppression threshold.                                                                                                 | `True`     |
| options             | dict                                |                                                                                                                                                                      | `None`     |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type                                                              | Description   |
|--------|-------------------------------------------------------------------|---------------|
|        | DataFrame, HTML str, or great_tables GT object (when type=\'gt\') |               |
